2026-02-25
This file accomplishes the following tasks
1. Read the standardized NGAL data and mediation data.
2. Append the standardized NGAL data at T3 to the mediation data.

```{r}
# load package for manipulating tibbles
library(tidyverse)
# load package for reading xlsx files
library(readxl)
```

```{r}
# read the data
stand_NGAL_T3 <- read.csv("standardized_KIM1_NGAL.csv") %>%
  select(c(PID, delta_NGAL_stand_T3))

mediation_data <- read.csv("../analysis_data_11192025.csv")

merged_data <- merge(mediation_data, stand_NGAL_T3, by="PID", all.x=TRUE) %>%
  select(c(creatlst, age, gender, bmi, hypertn, dm, copd, chf, prior_mi, hgb, hdef,
           statin, acearb, betablocker, rbc_transfusion, nadirDO2, xclamp_duration, 
          delta_NGAL_stand_T3, aki)) %>%
  mutate(hgb = 3*hgb) %>%
  rename(hct = hgb) %>%
  drop_na()

head(merged_data)
```

```{r}
# write the csv
write.csv(merged_data, "../mediation_data_final_NGAL_stand_T3.csv", row.names=FALSE)
```
